name: Potato-Leek Pancake
recipeIngredient: Leeks (white and green parts, cleaned and finely chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the White Rose potatoes and soak them in cold water for 30 minutes.
2. Grate the soaked potatoes and squeeze out all moisture by wringing them in dry dish towels.
3. Heat 2 tablespoons butter in a heavy frying pan. Add the leeks and sauté until wilted. Season with salt and pepper, then add to the grated potatoes and mix well.
4. Heat the remaining butter in a nonstick skillet. Add the potato-leek mixture and flatten it into a pancake. Cover and cook over medium-high heat for about 5 minutes.
5. Turn the pancake and cook until brown and crisp.
6. Invert onto a serving platter and slice with a serrated knife or pizza cutter into wedges.
Per Serving:
205 calories, 3 g protein, 24 g carbohydrate, 12 g fat (7 g saturated), 31 mg cholesterol, 369 mg sodium, 1 g fiber.
